children.text: to provide equal employment protection for employees of the Department (including pursuant to the provisions in and the Notification and Federal Employee Antidiscrimination and Retaliation Act of 2002 ()); orsection 2302(b)(1) of title 5Public Law 107–174

to provide whistleblower protections for employees of the Department (including pursuant to the provisions in section 2302(b)(8) and (9) of such title and the Notification and Federal Employee Antidiscrimination and Retaliation Act of 2002).
